response: The People Team shared that the company’s Q1 employee engagement survey earned an overall score of 7.8/10, which exceeds the industry average of 7.2, with team collaboration ranking as the highest-rated metric at 8.9/10 and career growth clarity as the lowest-scoring metric at 6.1/10. To address the gap in career growth clarity, the team has proposed three core interventions: quarterly career conversations, an internal mobility program, and companywide mentorship matching, and will host a town hall this Friday to discuss these plans with all employees.
